ddls:
CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "onset_sec" REAL /* Onset time of the note in seconds */,
  "duration_sec" REAL /* Duration of the note in seconds */,
  "pitch" INTEGER /* Pitch of the note */,
  "velocity" INTEGER /* Velocity of the note */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track the note belongs to */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the channel the note is played on */,
  "note_identifier" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the note (e.g., n0, n1) */,
  "last_beat" REAL /* Time of the last beat in seconds */,
  "last_beat_ref" REAL /* Reference time of the last beat in seconds */,
  "beat" INTEGER /* Beat number in the composition where the note starts */,
  "measure" INTEGER /* Measure number in the composition where the note starts */,
  "tempo" INTEGER /* Tempo (BPM) at the onset of the note */,
  "time_signature" TEXT /* Time signature at the onset of the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., quarter note, half note) */,
  "velocity_type" TEXT /* Type of velocity (e.g., forte, piano) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "track_type" TEXT /* Type of the track (e.g., vocal, instrumental) */,
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the composition the track belongs to */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Instrument used in the track */,
  "midi_program" INTEGER /* MIDI program number for the instrument */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_composition_id FOREIGN KEY ("composition_id") REFERENCES compositions ("composition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the channel (e.g., MIDI channel 1) */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument associated with the channel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the channel was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the channel was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compositions" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each composition */,
  "composition_name" TEXT /* Name of the composition */,
  "composer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the composer who created the composition */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the composition was released */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the composition */,
  "duration" REAL /* Total duration of the composition in seconds */,
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the studio where the composition was recorded */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer who produced the composition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the composition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the composition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compositions_composer_id FOREIGN KEY ("composer_id") REFERENCES composers ("composer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "composers" (
  "composer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each composer */,
  "composer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the composer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the composer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the composer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the composer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the composer is based */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the composer's information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the composer's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the composition being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the composition */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the composition was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the composition */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the web browser used to access the composition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_composition_id FOREIGN KEY ("composition_id") REFERENCES compositions ("composition_id")
)
